name: ground-clamped-polyline-route
description: Draw a ground-clamped polyline between cities. Tests polyline creation, clampToGround, and multi-point paths.
prompt: Draw a red polyline route on the globe connecting these cities in order: Los Angeles (-118.2437, 34.0522), Denver (-104.9903, 39.7392), Chicago (-87.6298, 41.8781), New York (-74.0060, 40.7128). The line should follow the ground (clamped to terrain), be 4 pixels wide, and have a red color. Add a labeled point at each city.
expected_behaviors: Creates a polyline entity with positions for all 4 cities
Adds point + label entities at each city
visual_expectations: A red line connecting LA → Denver → Chicago → NYC across the US, following terrain. Four labeled city markers visible at each endpoint.

screenshots.description: Red line across US with city labels
